name: Mom's White Chocolate Candy
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Vanilla candy coating (or confectioner's coating or almond bark)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Midwest Living, December 1994
1. Heat the candy coating in a casserole dish or saucepan at 200 degrees oven for about 25 minutes, stirring occasionally until melted.
2. Meanwhile, place marshmallows, cereals, and nuts in a large bowl.
3. Pour the melted candy coating over the mixture, stirring to coat.
4. Drop the mixture by rounded teaspoons onto waxed paper-lined cookie sheets.
5. Let stand until set.
Note: You can also pat the mixture into a buttered 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan. Let it stand until set; cut into squares.
